CustomField.description: URL for the company logo. Please create an SFDC Document type with an image of the company's logo. Then copy the Document's URL and paste in this text box. The logo will then appear as an image in the Company Logo field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: URL for the company logo. Please create an SFDC Document type with an image of the company's logo. Then copy the Document's URL and paste in this text box. The logo will then appear as an image in the Company Logo field.
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_OP Company Logo URL
